model_sheet.tasks_no_item_warn: This model has no garment item assigned: tasks will be created WITHOUT estimated time. Assign the item in the edit wizard to inherit times from the matrix.

model_sheet.phase_top: The model is already at the final phase (TOP).
model_sheet.advance_help: The phase change will be recorded (GateEvent). The phase is a status marker; tasks are not affected.
model_sheet.regress_help: The regress will be recorded (GateEvent kind=regress). It reopens the previous phase's work; any redone time accumulates on the same tasks (which stay open).

model_sheet.phase_top_disabled: The model is already at the final phase (TOP).
model_sheet.cancel_pending_warn: {{n}} pending tasks of this phase will be cancelled; the owner takes responsibility.
model_sheet.fitting_dup_warn: This model already has a fitting scheduled in this phase. Do you want to create another one anyway?
